CreateAlarmPolicy.name: Alarm policy name, must be unique
CreateAlarmPolicy.objects: List of monitored objects; fill this field when all log stores share the same target log store
CreateAlarmPolicy.targets.startTimeOffsetMinute: Query start time offset in minutes, range: [-1440, 0)
CreateAlarmPolicy.targets.endTimeOffsetMinute: Query end time offset in minutes, range: (startTimeOffsetMinute, 0]
CreateAlarmPolicy.triggerConditions.level: Alarm severity level, options: INFO, WARN, CRITICAL
CreateAlarmPolicy.schedule.fixTimeMinute: Specified time as minute of the day, range: [0, 1440)
CreateAlarmPolicy.schedule.dayOfWeek: Fixed frequency; 0: every day, 1–7: specific day of the week
CreateAlarmPolicy.pendingCount: Consecutive trigger threshold; number of consecutive triggers before an alarm is fired
CreateAlarmPolicy.repeatIntervalMinute: Repeat alarm interval in minutes; default: 0 (repeat alarm disabled)
CreateAlarmPolicy.recoverWithoutNotice: Whether to notify on recovery; true: no notification, false: notify; default: false
CreateAlarmPolicy.state: Policy enabled state; ENABLED: enabled, DISABLED: disabled
CreateAlarmPolicy.noticeState: Notification enabled state; ENABLED: enabled, DISABLED: disabled
CreateAlarmPolicy.notices: Alarm notification templates; see: BCM Notification Template API
CreateAlarmPolicy.notices.name: Alarm template name
CreateAlarmPolicy.notices.methods: Alarm template notification methods; values: EMAIL, SMS, PHONE
CreateAlarmPolicy.noticeRawLogs: Whether to include raw logs in alarm notifications
CreateAlarmPolicy.noticeRawLogs.type: Configuration type; REF: reference query statement, CUSTOM: custom query statement
CreateAlarmPolicy.noticeRawLogs.refTarget: Index of the referenced query statement (0-based); required when type=REF
CreateAlarmPolicy.noticeRawLogs.customTarget: Custom query statement; fill when type=CUSTOM
CreateAlarmPolicy.noticeRawLogs.columns: List of field names to display in raw logs
CreateAlarmPolicy.noticeRawLogs.limit: Maximum number of log entries to display; max value: 5
